title: Masters Of Knecht
description: A Modpack for all the Knechtz out there!
body:
"Masters Of Knecht" is a small modpack that tries to offer qualitiy-of-life improvements, additional decoration material, some world changes and performance improvements.

The main goal of this mod pack is offfering small enhancements without being overloaded by hundreds of mods. Because of that and the fact that sodium and other performance improvements are included, it should also run decent on older hardware. Just make sure to change the settings accordingly.

A server pack may follow some day in the future.

For a list of all mods please look under dependencies.

Besides the mods listed there, the mods listed below have been directly included in the pack:
- Roughly Enough Resources (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-resources)
